ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-06-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL; MAINTAINING CURRENT TRIAL DATE OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SEVERING CASE FROM GROUP AND SPECIALLY SETTING; AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF WAS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (D). THE CASE IS SEVERED FROM BRAYTON GROUP 357. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 6/5/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 5/26/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. G.O. 140 WAS NOT STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE, BY FAX, AN ECONOMIC REPORT AND/OR OFFER THEIR EXPERT ECONOMIST FOR DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERKS: VMU/JIROQUE/LESPY; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
